tool.name: OGS: Feflow2Mesh
tool.description: Galaxy wrapper for the OGS utility 'Feflow2Mesh'.
tool.command: ln -sf '$in' '$in.element_identifier'; Feflow2Mesh --in '$in.element_identifier' --out output_1.if extension is msh, old OGS file format is written

data.name: output_Feflow2Mesh
data.format: if extension is msh, old ogs file format is written
data.label: Output from Feflow2Mesh
data.from_work_dir: output_1.if extension is msh, old OGS file format is written

tool.help: This tool runs the **Feflow2Mesh** utility from the OpenGeoSys suite.
